title: Microlocal study of Lefschetz fixed point formulas for   higher-dimensional fixed point sets
summary:
We introduce new Lagrangian cycles which encode local contributions of
Lefschetz numbers of constructible sheaves into geometric objects. We study
their functorial properties and apply them to Lefschetz fixed point formulas
with higher-dimensional fixed point sets.

title: Complex Hessian Equation on K\"ahler Manifold
summary:
In this paper, complex Hessian equation over K\"ahler manifold was studied.
Under the condition that the underline K\"ahler manifold has non-negative
holomorphic bisectional curvature, the existence and regularity of the solution
was proved.
